name: open-file-bring-to-front-frontmatter-block
title: Markpad: bring-to-front przy otwieraniu plikow i blok front matter
original_prompt: Problem 1: kiedy Markpad laduje plik przez skojarzenie .md / dwuklik, aplikacja ma zawsze pokazac okno i przeniesc je na pierwszy plan, takze gdy jest zwinieta lub ukryta. Problem 2: YAML front matter na poczatku planow ma nie renderowac sie jako sciana naglowkow; ma byc renderowany jak blok metadanych w stylu Obsidian, z eleganckim podgladem, edycja i zwijaniem do jednej linii.

entries.note: Dodano test RED/GREEN i moduł logiki YAML front matter: wykrywanie bloku, stripping body, pola UI i aktualizacja wartości.
Dodano helper bring-to-front w Tauri: show, unminimize i set_focus są używane przez show_window, single-instance, startup z argumentem pliku i macOS Opened.
Podpięto panel front matter do MarkdownViewer: render preview stripuje front matter przed render_markdown, panel pokazuje properties, obsługuje zwijanie i edycję top-level pól.

verification.outcome: npm run check: exit 0, svelte-check found 0 errors and 14 pre-existing warnings outside the changed front matter panel.
cd src-tauri && cargo check blocked by environment before app compilation: pkg-config/OpenSSL not installed for openssl-sys.
npx -y tsx --test scripts/*.test.ts: 20 tests passed, 0 failed.
npm run check: exit 0, svelte-check found 0 errors and 14 existing warnings in Settings/TitleBar/ZoomOverlay.
npm run build: exit 0; Vite/SvelteKit production build completed and wrote static site to build/. Warnings were existing a11y/chunk-size/import warnings.

Execution CoVe: final diff/status match requested scope: Tauri focus helper for associated-file opens, frontMatter parser/tests, MarkdownViewer front matter panel/render path, CSS, and yaml dependency. Verified with npx -y tsx --test scripts/*.test.ts, npm run check, and npm run build. Rust cargo check and GUI smoke were not completed because the local Tauri/Rust dependency build is blocked by missing pkg-config/OpenSSL for openssl-sys. Dirty worktree also contains unrelated release artifacts and Ctrl+T adhoc files left untouched.

final_result: Implemented bring-to-front handling for associated-file opens and an Obsidian-like front matter properties panel with parsing, editing, collapse state, styling, and focused tests. Frontend verification passed. Rust compile/runtime smoke remains blocked in this environment by missing pkg-config/OpenSSL for openssl-sys.
